entity.summary: Indonesian centralized crypto-asset trading platform established in September 2021 and operated by PT Utama Aset Digital Indonesia.
entity.notes: Bittime's official support materials state that the platform was established in September 2021. The operating company was incorporated on September 28, 2021, registered with Indonesia's communications authority in November 2021, and recognized by Bappebti in April 2022.

events.title: Bittime established
events.description: Bittime was established in Indonesia in September 2021 as a crypto-asset trading platform operated by PT Utama Aset Digital Indonesia.
events.notes: Official sources establish September 2021 but do not state a precise platform launch day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level date placeholder.

evidence.title: Bittime official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Bittime identity and active crypto-asset trading platform.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Bittime
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Bittime exchange identity.

evidence.title: What is Bittime?
evidence.notes: Official support article states that Bittime has been established since September 2021 and describes its crypto trading service.

evidence.title: Bittime Terms and Conditions
evidence.notes: Official terms identify PT Utama Aset Digital Indonesia and state that the company was incorporated on September 28, 2021.
